scripts.build: echo '[workspace:@tinyfy/editor-schema] build' && npm run build --workspace=@tinyfy/editor-schema && echo '[workspace:@tinyfy/editor] build' && npm run build --workspace=@tinyfy/editor && echo '[workspace:@tinyfy/renderer] build' && npm run build --workspace=@tinyfy/renderer && echo '[workspace:@tinyfy/playground] build' && npm run build --workspace=@tinyfy/playground
scripts.typecheck: echo '[workspace:@tinyfy/editor-schema] build' && npm run build --workspace=@tinyfy/editor-schema && echo '[workspace:@tinyfy/editor] typecheck' && npm run typecheck --workspace=@tinyfy/editor && echo '[workspace:@tinyfy/editor] build' && npm run build --workspace=@tinyfy/editor && echo '[workspace:@tinyfy/renderer] typecheck' && npm run typecheck --workspace=@tinyfy/renderer && echo '[workspace:@tinyfy/playground] typecheck' && npm run typecheck --workspace=@tinyfy/playground
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspaces --if-present && eslint test e2e
